narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 3-D (precinct in Scioto County) has 678 registered voters, with 47.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points.
